packet_label: M5 Keyboard Assistive Selection Parity And Roving Focus

profiles.label_summary: Pipeline run list keyboard selection with roving tabindex over streaming rows

focus_model.navigation_bound_label: Arrow keys clamp at the first and last run; Home and End jump to the ends

commands.accessible_name: Toggle selection of the focused run
commands.announcement: Focused run selected

commands.accessible_name: Extend selection to the next run
commands.announcement: Range extended to include the next run

commands.accessible_name: Clear the entire selection
commands.announcement: Selection cleared

commands.accessible_name: Announce items selected outside the current view
commands.announcement: Some selected run items are hidden outside the current filter

commands.accessible_name: Open batch review for the current selection
commands.announcement: Batch review opened for the current selection

announcement.sample_announcement: 3 runs selected; focus on Run 7 of 412

churn_resilience.detail_label: new runs stream in above the focused run; focus stays on the same run by id
a background refresh re-keys rows; focus and selection hold by stable id

offscreen_durability.detail_label: all selected runs are within the loaded window

profiles.label_summary: Review queue keyboard selection with aria-activedescendant and hidden-selected exposure

commands.accessible_name: Open batch review for the current selection
commands.announcement: Batch review opened for the current selection

announcement.sample_announcement: 12 selected; 3 outside the current filter; focus on review item 5

a refresh leaves hidden-selected members intact and announced

offscreen_durability.detail_label: 3 selected review items are outside the current filter

profiles.label_summary: Reference graph tree keyboard selection with focus re-anchor on virtualization recycle

focus_model.navigation_bound_label: Arrow keys walk visible tree order; Left collapses, Right expands; ends clamp

commands.accessible_name: Toggle selection of the focused node
commands.announcement: Focused node selected

commands.accessible_name: Extend selection to the next node
commands.announcement: Range extended to include the next node

commands.announcement: Selection cleared

commands.announcement: Batch review opened for the current selection

announcement.sample_announcement: 8 nodes selected; 5 collapsed out of view; focus on Node B

churn_resilience.detail_label: the focused node scrolled out and its DOM recycled; focus re-anchors on the nearest visible node and is announced
re-rooting the tree keeps selection on the same nodes by stable id

offscreen_durability.detail_label: 5 selected nodes are collapsed or scrolled out of the virtualized view
